betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Servos§f

§aExtract items and fluids from blocks into duct networks automatically with configurable filter slots and routing modes!§f

§bServos§f are attachments installed on fluiduct and itemduct connections. They pull contents from the connected block into the duct.

§6Tiers§f:
§b• Basic§f — §e3 seconds per extraction§f, §e8× stack§f, §e50%§f fluid rate, §e3 filter slots§f.
§b• Hardened§f — §e2 seconds§f, §e16× stack§f, §e75%§f fluid rate, §e6 slots§f.
§b• Reinforced§f — §e1 second§f, §e32× stack§f, §e100%§f fluid rate, §e9 slots§f.
§b• Signalum§f — §e0.5 seconds§f, §e64× stack§f, §e2× speed boost§f, §e150%§f fluid rate, §e12 slots§f.
§b• Resonant§f — §e0.5 seconds§f, §e64× stack§f, §e3× speed boost§f, §e200%§f fluid rate, §e15 slots§f.

§6Filter Modes§f:
Supported modes: Blacklist/Whitelist, Metadata, NBT, Ore Dictionary, Mod Owner (tier-dependent).

§6Routing Modes§f (Reinforced and above):
Nearest-First, Furthest-First, Random, Round Robin.

§eNote§f: By default, servos require redstone signal (High mode). This is configurable per-servo.
